  • Package qtouch

      class QTouchException extends Exception implements Serializable

      class QTouchSplash extends JWindow implements Serializable

          QTouchModel model

    • Class qtouch.QTouchView

      class QTouchView extends JFrame implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • aboutItem
          JMenuItem aboutItem
          Menu items: New Game, Save Game, and About dialog.
        • boardLabel
          JLabel boardLabel
          Main board image updated by the controller as the game progresses.
        • centerCard
          JLabel centerCard
          Center card area (if used in design).
        • colorMenu
          JMenu colorMenu
          Game menus: Game, Settings, Language, Look & Feel, Colors, Help.
        • currentLocale
          Locale currentLocale
          Current language/locale setting for the UI.
        • currentPlayerLabel
          JLabel currentPlayerLabel
          Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.

          JLabel diceLabel
          Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.

          JLabel drawCardLabel1
          Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.
        • drawCardLabel2
          JLabel drawCardLabel2
          Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.
        • exitItem
          JMenuItem exitItem
          Menu item used to exit the game window.

          JMenu gameMenu
          Game menus: Game, Settings, Language, Look & Feel, Colors, Help.

          JMenu helpMenu
          Game menus: Game, Settings, Language, Look & Feel, Colors, Help.

          JMenu languageMenu
          Game menus: Game, Settings, Language, Look & Feel, Colors, Help.
        • leftPanel
          JPanel leftPanel
          Left player's panel (cards, image, score).
        • lookFeelMenu
          JMenu lookFeelMenu
          Game menus: Game, Settings, Language, Look & Feel, Colors, Help.
        • menuBar
          JMenuBar menuBar
          Main menu bar for Game, Settings, and Help menus.
        • messages
          ResourceBundle messages
          Loaded message bundle for localization.
        • model
          QTouchModel model
          The shared QTouchModel instance used by the view.
        • newGameItem
          JMenuItem newGameItem
          Menu items: New Game, Save Game, and About dialog.
        • pauseIcon
          ImageIcon pauseIcon
          Icons for the Start and Pause buttons.
        • player1Score
          JLabel player1Score
          Labels showing touchdown scores for both players.
        • player1Title
          JLabel player1Title
          Labels showing the names of Player 1 and Player 2.
        • player2Score
          JLabel player2Score
          Labels showing touchdown scores for both players.
        • player2Title
          JLabel player2Title
          Labels showing the names of Player 1 and Player 2.

          JPanel rightPanel
          Left player's panel (cards, image, score).
        • rollButton
          JButton rollButton
          Buttons for rolling dice and starting/pausing the game.

          Menu items: New Game, Save Game, and About dialog.

          JMenu settingsMenu
          Game menus: Game, Settings, Language, Look & Feel, Colors, Help.

          Buttons for rolling dice and starting/pausing the game.
        • timeLabel
          JLabel timeLabel
          Displays current player, remaining time, dice value, and draw pile info.
        • turnTimer
          Timer turnTimer
          Swing timer for countdown per turn.
